name: A+ - My Brother the Minotaur (2026) (IE)
plot: When a minotaur raised by humans starts dreaming of his mythical past, he sets out on a wild adventure—with help from his brother and friends—to understand who he really is.
cast: Ely Solan, Billy Jenkins, Luciana Akpobaro, Billie Boullet

name: A+ - The Snoopy Show (2021) (US)
plot: The world's most iconic dog is ready for his close-up. Dive into new adventures with the happy-dancing, high-flying, big-dreaming beagle, who's joined by best friend Woodstock and the rest of the Peanuts gang.
cast: Ethan Pugiotto, Terry McGurrin, Rob Tinkler, Christian Dal Dosso, Isabella Leo, Wyatt White, Holly Gorski, Hattie Kragten
director: Rob Boutilier, Mark Evestaff, Alex Galatis

name: A+ - The Sisters Grimm (2025) (US)
plot: One year after their parents' mysterious disappearance, sisters Sabrina and Daphne move to a magical town where fairytales are real and secrets lurk behind every corner.
cast: Ariel Winter, Leah Newman, Laraine Newman, Abubakar Salim, Billy Harris, Harry Trevaldwyn

name: A+ - Stillwater (2020) (US)
plot: Siblings Karl, Addy and Michael have a very special next-door neighbor: a wise panda named Stillwater. His friendship and stories give them new perspectives on the world, themselves, and each other.
cast: James Sie, Eva Ariel Binder, Tucker Chandler, Judah Mackey

name: A+ - Goldie (2025) (CA)
plot: Follow Goldie as she shakes up her beloved town of Boysenberg with her best friends. Together, they learn that being different is something to celebrate—and it's a whole lot of fun.
cast: Jessica McKenna, Dee Bradley Baker, Amari McCoy, Vedanten Naidoo, Grey DeLisle, James Sie, Brady Gagne, Naiya Singh Padilla

name: A+ - Wonder Pets: In the City (2024) (US)
plot: Team up for heroic adventures with Izzy the Guinea Pig, Zuri the Bunny, and Tate the Snake—a trio of opera-singing New York City classroom pets—as they answer calls from animals in need all around the world.
cast: Victoria Scola-Giampapa, Vanessa Huszar, Christopher Sean Cooper Jr., McKenzie Melia Calderon, Torian Brackett

name: A+ - Curses!
plot: The Vanderhouvens are a typical family…except a curse recently turned Alex—their loving husband and father—to stone. In order to save him, his wife and kids set out on spine-tingling adventures to return ancient artifacts stolen by an ancestor.
cast: Andre Robinson, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green, Lyric Lewis, Reid Scott, Rhys Darby, James Marsters
genre: Animation / Kids / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: A+ - Camp Snoopy (2024) (CA)
plot:
After discovering their troop is in danger of disbanding, Snoopy and the Beagle Scouts set off to the great outdoors to earn their badges. Meanwhile, Charlie Brown and friends enjoy their summer at Camp Spring Lake.
بعد طرده من الغابة، يجد "وودي" في معسكر "عا هو" موطنه الأبدي... إلى أن يهدد مفتش بإغلاق المعسكر.
cast: Etienne Kellici, Terry McGurrin, Rob Tinkler, Caleb Bellavance, Molly Lewis, Cash Allen-Martin, Hattie Kragten, Isabella Leo

name: A+ - WondLa (2024) (US)
plot:
Forced to flee her underground sanctuary for Earth’s surface, Eva discovers a world unlike anything she expected. As she journeys across perilous terrain and unknown civilizations, Eva searches to answer the ultimate question: Is she the last human?
مقتبس من رواية الأطفال للكاتبتوني ديتيرليزي، ويعد الفيلم بمغامرة آسرة في عالم غريب ومستقبلي. تدور القصة حول “إيفا”، وهي مراهقة فضولية ومتحمسة تتولى تربيتها مربية روبوت تدعى “مثر” في مخبأ حديث تحت الأرض. يقدم المخرج رؤية فريدة وجذابة لهذا العالم الرائع
cast: Jeanine Mason, Teri Hatcher, D. C. Douglas

name: A+ - Jane (2023) (CA)
plot:
Budding environmentalist Jane is a 9-year-old on a quest to save endangered animals. Using her powerful imagination, Jane takes her best friends David and Greybeard the chimpanzee on epic adventures to help protect wild animals all around the world.
تعمل جين جارسيا ، فتاة تبلغ من العمر 10 سنوات وزملاؤها الموثوق بهم على حماية حيوان معرض للخطر في كل حلقة مدفوعة بالمهمة
cast: Ava Louise Murchison, Mason Blomberg, Dan Abramovici

name: A+ - Sago Mini Friends
plot:
Welcome to Sagoville, where Harvey loves to play and discover ways to have silly fun! He and his closest friends explore, imagine, and express true thankfulness for all things, big and small, through creative adventures and unforgettable songs.

استنادًا إلى تطبيق الأطفال الشهير والحائز على جوائز "Sago Mini World". يضم الكلب هارفي ذو الأذنين المرنة وأفضل أصدقائه، القط جينجا، والأرنب جاك، والطائر روبن.

name: A+ - Fraggle Rock: Back to the Rock (2022)
plot:
Join Gobo, Red, Wembley, Mokey, Boober, and new Fraggle friends on hilarious, epic adventures about the magic that happens when we celebrate and care for our interconnected world.
انضموا إلى "غوبو" و"ريد" و"ويمبلي" و"موكي" و"بوبر" وأصدقاء الفراغل الجدد في مغامرات ملحمية مضحكة عن السحر الذي يحدث عندما نحتفي بعالمنا المترابط ونهتم به
cast: Lilli Cooper, John Tartaglia, Dave Goelz, Jordan Lockhart

name: A+ - Interrupting Chicken
plot: A young little chicken named Piper has a habit of interrupting storytime! Every time Piper hears a story, she can’t help but jump in, ask questions and let her imagination run wild as she tries to fill in details, guess what happens next or insert herself in the middle of the action to help save the day.
cast: Juliet Donenfeld, Sterling K. Brown, Luke Lowe, Maximus Tran, Jakari Fraser, LaNisa Renee Frederick, Mary Faber, Sarah Elizabeth Thompson

name: A+ - Puppy Place
plot: Charles and Lizzie Peterson have found the perfect way to foster their love of dogs — literally. The siblings take on the tough but rewarding task of fostering puppies and finding their forever homes. With every new pup, a new adventure begins.
cast: Riley Looc, Brooklynn MacKinzie, Eric Lyon, Dominique Toney

name: A+ - Best Foot Forward
plot: Josh Dubin is thrilled to switch from homeschool to public school, and being the only kid with a prosthetic leg is a challenge he’s ready to face. As he carves out a place among his peers, his friends and family are with him every step of the way.
cast: Logan Marmino, Peyton Jackson, Trinity Bliss, Joy Suprano, Stephen Schneider

name: A+ - Circuit Breakers
plot: In this sci-fi anthology series, curiosity leads to chaos when students in the near future experience mysterious events.

name: A+ - Amber Brown
plot: Between her parents’ divorce and best friend moving away, Amber Brown is having a tough time. But her art, video diary, and new friend Brandi provide outlets for Amber to express her feelings and find gratitude in the love that surrounds her.
cast: Carsyn Rose, Sarah Drew, Liliana Inouye, Darin Brooks

name: A+ - Shape Island (2023) (US)
plot: On a charming island, Square, Triangle, and Circle seek adventure and connection while learning how to navigate each other's differences.
cast: Gideon Adlon, Scott Adsit, Harvey Guillén, Yvette Nicole Brown

name: A+ - Central Park (US)
plot: An animated musical comedy about the Tillermans, a family that lives in a castle in Central Park. Owen, the park manager, and Paige, his journalist wife, raise their kids Molly and Cole in the world’s most famous park, while fending off a hotel heiress, Bitsy Brandenham, who would love nothing more than to turn the park into condos.
cast: Josh Gad, Leslie Odom Jr., Tituss Burgess, Daveed Diggs, Kathryn Hahn, Stanley Tucci
director: Josh Gad, Loren Bouchard, Nora Smith

name: A+ - Ghostwriter (US)
plot: When a ghost haunts a neighborhood bookstore and starts releasing fictional characters into the real world, four kids must team up to solve an exciting mystery surrounding the ghost’s unfinished business.

name: A+ - El Deafo (US)
plot: Going to school and making new friends can be tough. Having to do both while wearing a bulky hearing aid on your chest? That takes superpowers! With a little help from her superhero alter ego, El Deafo, Cece learns to embrace her differences.

name: A+ - Harriet the Spy (US)
plot: Outspoken and perpetually curious. That’s 11-year-old Harriet in a nutshell. But if she’s going to be Harriet M. Welsch, future writer, she’ll need to know everything. And to know everything means she’ll need to spy…on everyone.

name: A+ - Wolfboy and The Everything Factory (US)
plot: William Wolfe is no ordinary human boy. Down in the magical spryte realm of the Everything Factory, he’s Wolfboy. And with his new spryte friends, he learns his vivid imagination and limitless creativity have the power to change the world.

name: A+ - Pinecone & Pony (CA)
plot: Kate Beaton’s beloved book comes to life in this animated series. As a warrior in training, Pinecone fears no challenge. Thankfully, Pony always makes sure Pinecone never gets in over her head. Together they learn life can be a fun-filled adventure.
